name: keeping-you-awake-control
title: Keeping You Awake Control
description: Control KeepingYouAwake — toggle, activate for hours/minutes, or deactivate. Requires KeepingYouAwake (https://keepingyouawake.app/).
author: schmas

preferences.name: defaultHours
preferences.title: Default Hours
preferences.description: Hours to keep awake when using the Activate command. Leave empty to activate indefinitely.

commands.name: kya-activate
commands.title: Activate
commands.subtitle: KYA
commands.description: Activate KeepingYouAwake for the configured default hours

commands.name: kya-hours
commands.title: Activate for Hours
commands.subtitle: KYA
commands.description: Activate KeepingYouAwake for a specified number of hours

commands.name: kya-minutes
commands.title: Activate for Minutes
commands.subtitle: KYA
commands.description: Activate KeepingYouAwake for a specified number of minutes

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
